featureCards.heading: Built for large companies with complex operations
featureCards.description: ERA was designed to match the complexity of your operation. Robust infrastructure, cutting-edge security, and flexibility to adapt to your business rules.
featureCards.card1Desc: Create and organize your service, support, sales, and finance teams all in one place.
featureCards.card2Title: Gain Credibility with Meta's Official API
featureCards.card2Desc: Connect to Meta's official API directly from the system for greater stability and security in your communications.
featureCards.card3Desc: Turn every interaction into intelligence: track service metrics, identify opportunities, and make decisions that accelerate your sales.

platform.title: The complete platform
platform.description: Connect every channel, automate with AI, and turn data into results. One platform, all the products your operation needs to scale.
platform.productsDesc: From first contact to after-sales, ERA offers integrated products covering every step of the customer journey.
platform.catCommSub: Connect all channels in a unified experience
platform.catInfraSub: Robust APIs to scale your communication operation
platform.catServiceSub: Tools for teams that live the customer's day-to-day
platform.useCasesHeading: Built for those who live the customer
platform.useCasesDesc: Regardless of your segment, ERA adapts to the complexity of your operation.
platform.useCase1Desc: Manage thousands of interactions with PBX, IVR, dialer, and AI — all with real-time metrics.
platform.useCase2Desc: CRM integrated with WhatsApp, visual pipeline, automated proposals, and intelligent follow-up.
platform.useCase3Desc: 24/7 chatbots, intelligent escalation, knowledge base, and automated SLA.
platform.useCase4Desc: Segmented broadcasts, AI content creation, multichannel campaigns, and complete analytics.
platform.whyDesc: While other companies offer isolated solutions, ERA integrates communication, automation, AI, and data into a cohesive ecosystem. Fewer tools, more results.
platform.diff1: Official Meta API — WhatsApp with stability and security
platform.diff2: Integrated generative AI — intelligent responses across all channels
platform.diff3: Multi-tenant infrastructure — scales for providers and enterprises
platform.diff4: Cloud PBX + transcription — every call becomes actionable data
platform.diff5: Native CRM — sales and service in the same environment
platform.diff6: Dashboards and BI — decisions based on data, not intuition
platform.diff7: 100+ integrations — connect with HubSpot, Salesforce, Zapier and more
platform.diff8: GPTW and Google 4.9 — recognized as a market reference
platform.ecoDesc: Every ERA product was designed to work together. Data flows between channels, AI learns from every interaction, and your teams gain complete context.
platform.finalDesc: Start today. No commitment, no credit card. Talk to a specialist and discover the ideal plan for your company.
platform.eraChatDesc: Intelligent messaging service. WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger, Telegram and more — all in one panel with AI, chatbots, and automations.
platform.eraVozDesc: Cloud PBX, call center, smart IVR, and auto dialer. Record, transcribe, and analyze all calls with AI.
platform.eraOmniDesc: Complete omnichannel platform. Unify voice, chat, and data in a consistent experience for customers and teams.
platform.wabaHubDesc: Multi-tenant gateway for WhatsApp Business API. Intelligent routing, credits, templates, and direct Meta integration.
platform.appComHubDesc: Unified communication and automation platform. WhatsApp, SMS, RCS, Voice, and Email with workflow builder and integrated AI.
platform.appCommChatDesc: Complete omnichannel CRM with unified inbox, sales automations, proposals, AI agents, and pipeline management.
platform.webCoExDesc: Omnichannel service platform with WhatsApp embed, operator management, schedules, and real-time metrics.
platform.coreMetricsDesc: Business Intelligence for contact centers. Automatic data collection, interactive dashboards, and sentiment analysis.
platform.studioProDesc: AI content creation. Generate professional images, videos, and audio for marketing — no designer needed.
